# terrible_cisco_mso_mso_schema_site_anp_epg_domain (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `anp` (String) The name of the ANP.
- `epg` (String) The name of the EPG.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `schema` (String) The name of the schema.
- `site` (String) The name of the site.
- `template` (String) The name of the template.

### Optional

- `allow_micro_segmentation` (Boolean) Specifies microsegmentation is enabled or not. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `allow_promiscuous` (String) The allow promiscuous state of the domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `binding_type` (String) Which binding_type to use with this domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `custom_epg_name` (String) Which custom_epg_name to use with this domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `delimiter` (String) Which delimiter to use with this domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `deployment_immediacy` (String) The deployment immediacy of the domain. `immediate` means **Deploy immediate**. `lazy` means **deploy on demand**.
- `domain_association_type` (String) The type of domain to associate.
- `domain_profile` (String) The domain profile name.
- `enhanced_lagpolicy_dn` (String) Distinguished name of EPG lagpolicy. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `enhanced_lagpolicy_name` (String) EPG enhanced lagpolicy name. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `forged_transmits` (String) The forged transmits state of the domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `mac_changes` (String) The mac changes state of the domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `micro_seg_vlan` (Number) Virtual LAN for microsegmentation. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `micro_seg_vlan_type` (String) Virtual LAN type for microsegmentation. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `netflow_pref` (String) The netflow preference state of the domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `num_ports` (Number) Number of ports for the binding type. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port_allocation` (String) Port allocation for the binding type. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association and binding type in static. Required when `binding_type=static`.
- `port_encap_vlan` (Number) Virtual LAN type for port encap. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `port_encap_vlan_type` (String) Virtual LAN type for port encap. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `resolution_immediacy` (String) Determines when the policies should be resolved and available. Defaults to `lazy` when unset during creation.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `switch_type` (String) Which switch type to use with this domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `switching_mode` (String) Which switching mode to use with this domain association. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vlan_encap_mode` (String) Which VLAN enacap mode to use. This attribute can only be used with VMM domain association.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
